subcodes.first_line: O Fath'u'llah! Thy letter hath attained unto the glances of the Best-Beloved of the horizons, and this servant, present before His countenance, [that which] [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا فتح الله کتابت بلحاظ عنایت محبوب آفاق فائز و عبد حاضر تلقاء وجه آنچه در
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @praise and encouragement, @Crimson Ark; the Ark of God
